User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the RentaFast application, storing their role and potentially other profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, matching their Firebase Auth UID.

role.description: The user's role in the application (either 'landlord' or 'tenant').

Property.title: Property
Property.description: Represents a property listing in the RentaFast application.

landlordId.description: Reference to the User who owns this property. (Relationship: User 1:N Property)

title.description: The title of the property listing.

price.description: The rental price of the property.

description.description: A detailed description of the property.

amenities.description: A list of amenities offered by the property.

imageUrls.description: Array of URLs pointing to images of the property

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles, including their role (landlord or tenant). The document ID is the Firebase Auth UID.

/properties/{propertyId}.description: Stores property listings. Includes denormalized 'landlordId' for authorization independence.
